inline_comments.message:
Don't really know how the ValidationPolicy work, this is most likely already taken into account.  Thought I would mention it anyway.  

The "X-FromAppId" and "X-TransactionId" don't seem to align with what specify in the header, they are probably already converted to "xFromAppId" and "xTransactionId" at this point but just in case.
Yes. These attributes we extract from event itself which is pulled from message-router and this is how it is structured there by whoever creates the event. It is not taken from HTTP header directly
